training: som.train(use_epochs=True) — full passes over the data
caveat: ~70% of spirit vectors are single-occurrence and ~145 have zero attributes, so their vectors are near-identical near-zero points. The dominant 'Unnamed Host' mega-cluster is largely this null bucket, and the very low QE/TE partly reflect that degeneracy rather than meaningful topology. Filter to attributed spirits before treating clusters as 'courts'.
